workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.expectedPrompt: First copy your one-time code, then open https://github.com/login/device to approve the workflow scope; keep the terminal session open until gh reports success.
workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.interactiveApprovalNote: This is an interactive OAuth device flow; keep the terminal session open until gh reports success. If the browser approval is not completed, gh auth status will still omit workflow.
workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.sensitiveValuePolicy: Do not store, log, or paste the one-time device code into project files; the operator copies it from the local CLI prompt only.
workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.incompleteApprovalSignal: Token scopes still omit workflow after the refresh attempt, or the gh auth refresh session was cancelled or timed out.
workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.fallback: If browser approval cannot be completed, use each workflow row's installAction: open GitHub edit-file pages for existing mismatched files; do not use new-file links for replace_existing_remote_file rows.
workflowScopeApprovalHandoff.stopCondition: Do not run install-remote-workflow-files.mjs, gh workflow run, publish copy, or archive proof until workflowScopeAvailable=true or GitHub UI installation makes remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true.

checks.name: Publish JooPark Pages

remediation.nextStep: Open the existing workflow file editor, replace the entire file with the local template contents, commit to the default branch, then rerun the remote workflow file check.

blockers: pages: remote workflow file differs from local template

remediation.nextStep: No edit required; remote workflow file already matches the local template.

blockers: pages: remote workflow file differs from local template
nextActions: CLI workflow scope is available; remote installer can create or update workflow files.
Create or update both workflow files on the repository default branch with the exact local template contents.
Run node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write until remoteWorkflowFilesReady is true.
Then run node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write to confirm GitHub Actions visibility.
installPacket:
JooPark Remote Workflow Install Packet
Status: action required - install workflow files on the default branch
Generated: 2026-06-11T07:26:18.625Z
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Default branch: main
workflowScopeAvailable: true
workflowScopeInstallBlocked: false

Why this is required:
- GitHub repository contents API check source: https://docs.github.com/en/rest/repos/contents#get-repository-content
- Existing workflow file edits use GitHub's file editor: https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/working-with-files/managing-files/editing-files
- API replacement of an existing workflow file requires the current blob SHA: https://docs.github.com/en/rest/repos/contents#create-or-update-file-contents
- Manual workflow dispatch requires workflow_dispatch and the workflow file on the default branch: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/managing-workflow-runs/manually-running-a-workflow?tool=webui

Workflow scope preflight:
- workflowScopeAvailable: true
- workflowScopeInstallBlocked: false
- workflowScope.scopes: gist, read:org, repo, workflow
- refresh: gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow
- refresh with clipboard: gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow --clipboard
- recheck: node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
- approvalUrl: https://github.com/login/device
- interactive approval required: false
- terminal wait required: false
- post-approval auth status: gh auth status -h github.com
- incomplete approval signal: Token scopes still omit workflow after the refresh attempt, or the gh auth refresh session was cancelled or timed out.
- one-time device code policy: Do not store, log, or paste the one-time device code into project files; the operator copies it from the local CLI prompt only.
- GitHub UI fallback: If browser approval cannot be completed, use each workflow row's installAction: open GitHub edit-file pages for existing mismatched files; do not use new-file links for replace_existing_remote_file rows.

Install or repair steps:
1. Publish JooPark Pages
   Target: .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml
   Action: replace_existing_remote_file
   Template: docs/github-pages-workflow.yml
   Template SHA-256: 7d47ffeb39201dacff42a52825e7988d20aa28e81d2d54dfcf628a3c1e39619e
   Remote SHA-256: 8ea83aa0d99b303beb6b42976429acc207492d34de461a2ac9c026fbc4cb7574
   Remote blob SHA: a23c1d4502411242fce30d0fbf184ef0fadd8367
   Copy template: pbcopy < 'docs/github-pages-workflow.yml'
   Open GitHub new-file page: open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-pages.yml'
   Open GitHub edit page: open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml'
   Next: Open the existing workflow file editor, replace the entire file with the local template contents, commit to the default branch, then rerun the remote workflow file check.
2. Watch JooPark Candidate Drift
   Target: .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml
   Action: verified_remote_matches_template
   Template: docs/github-drift-watch-workflow.yml
   Template SHA-256: 1e6f0ed82323d4762a9bd78dfff01f18ec5e2b4882ee346acabed4542e5d46f2
   Remote SHA-256: 1e6f0ed82323d4762a9bd78dfff01f18ec5e2b4882ee346acabed4542e5d46f2
   Remote blob SHA: 9993158bcf1cb7458acd71d2f91e45539153b0a5
   Copy template: pbcopy < 'docs/github-drift-watch-workflow.yml'
   Open GitHub new-file page: open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-drift-watch.yml'
   Open GitHub edit page: open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml'
   Next: No edit required; remote workflow file already matches the local template.

Verification:
- node scripts/install-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write --verify
- node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
- node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write

Post-install verification checklist:
- If workflowScopeInstallBlocked: true, approve workflow scope with the refresh command or use the GitHub UI fallback before CLI remote install.
- Re-run remote file check and confirm remoteWorkflowFilesChecked: true.
- Confirm remoteWorkflowFilesReady: true.
- Confirm pages remoteExists: true and remoteMatchesTemplate: true (.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml).
- Confirm drift-watch remoteExists: true and remoteMatchesTemplate: true (.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml).
- Re-run publish dispatch plan and confirm remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady: true.
- Run dispatch only after allDispatchReady: true.

Current blockers:
- pages: remote workflow file differs from local template

Guard:
- Do not run install-remote-workflow-files.mjs, gh workflow run, publish copy, or archive proof until workflowScopeAvailable=true or GitHub UI installation makes remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true.
- Do not run gh workflow run until remoteWorkflowFilesReady: true and allDispatchReady: true.
